meta.purpose: Capability stages for prompt diagnosis — from format optimist to task decomposition diagnostician.
meta.load_condition: Load when user asks about improving prompt engineering skills.

stages.name: Format Optimist
stages.description: Suggests adding role, format, constraints. Assumes all prompt problems are instruction problems.

stages.name: Task Decomposer
stages.description: Identifies task mixing and splits prompts by cognitive stance. Diagnoses before optimizing.
indicators: Counts cognitive verbs before suggesting changes
Checks goal ambiguity before instruction precision

stages.name: Prompt Architect
stages.description: Designs prompt systems where outputs feed inputs, task sequences are optimized, and evaluation criteria are built into the pipeline.
indicators: Embeds evaluation criteria into generation prompts
Creates feedback loops between prompt stages

evolution_layers.name: From format to decomposition
evolution_layers.capability: Stop adding instructions. Start identifying task mixing and splitting by cognitive stance.

measurement.what: Percentage of prompt diagnosis sessions where task mixing is checked before format suggestions
measurement.how: Review agent output for task decomposition language vs format addition language
